command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && git add -A && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m "feat: ERROR-TO-GATE protocol — every error must produce a gate question

Constitutional: when any error is identified, prevention must include
a binary yes/no gate question placed where it will be asked. Wired into
Resolution Algorithm step 3, Self-Evolution step 4, CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push origin main 2>&1
